options.name: help
options.description: Print this help message and exit

options.name: version
options.description: Print the CLI version and exit

options.name: port
options.description: Port to run the dev server on

commands.name: dev
commands.description: Run your docs locally in development mode

commands.name: serve
commands.description: Serve your built docs in production mode

commands.name: migrateme
commands.description: Migrate your docs to the new xyd framework

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the docs directory to migrate

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install a xyd component into your project

arguments.name: component
arguments.description: Name of the component to install

commands.name: completion
commands.description: Generate shell completions or the CLI OpenCLI document. Run `xyd completion <zsh|fish>` to print a script, `xyd completion install [shell]` to install it, or `xyd completion opencli` to print the OpenCLI document.
